body.purpose: Task titles and primary content text.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: Dialogs and modals. The only elevated surface.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Task completion toggle. Rounded square with checkmark on fill.
components.css: .ds-checkbox { appearance: none; -webkit-appearance: none; width: 18px; height: 18px; border: 2px solid #AEAEB2; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; position: relative; flex-shrink: 0; transition: all 150ms ease; } .ds-checkbox:hover { border-color: #007AFF; } .ds-checkbox:checked { background: #007AFF; border-color: #007AFF; } .ds-checkbox:checked::after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 4px; top: 1px; width: 6px; height: 10px; border: solid white; border-width: 0 2px 2px 0; transform: rotate(45deg); }

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation link with icon and label.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 5px 8px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px; color: #8E8E93; text-decoration: none; transition: all 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #E8E8ED; color: #1C1C1E; } .ds-nav-item:hover svg { color: #AEAEB2; } .ds-nav-item.active { background: #E8E8ED; color: #1C1C1E; font-weight: 500; } .ds-nav-item.active svg { color: #007AFF; }

components.name: Task Item
components.description: A single task row with checkbox, title, and metadata.
components.html:
• Buy groceries
    Today
components.css: .ds-task-item { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; padding: 9px 8px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-task-item:hover { background: #E8E8ED; } .ds-task-content { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-task-title { font-size: 14px; color: #1C1C1E; display: block; } .ds-task-title.completed { text-decoration: line-through; color: #AEAEB2; } .ds-task-meta { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-top: 4px; } .ds-task-date { font-size: 11px; color: #8E8E93; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input with bottom border only.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 4px 0; font-size: 14px; background: transparent; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E5EA; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-input:focus { border-bottom-color: #007AFF; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #AEAEB2; }

components.name: Dialog
components.html: New Project
components.css: .ds-dialog-backdrop { position: fixed; inset: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); z-index: 50; } .ds-dialog { background: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 12px; padding: 32px; width: 400px; box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.25); } .ds-dialog-title { font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; color: #1C1C1E; margin-bottom: 24px; } .ds-dialog-actions { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 12px; margin-top: 32px; }

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Blue fill button for primary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { padding: 8px 20px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; background: #007AFF; color: #FFFFFF; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:active { opacity: 0.8; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { padding: 8px 20px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; background: transparent; color: #8E8E93; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #1C1C1E; }

components.name: Toast
components.css: .ds-toast { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 14px 20px; background: #1C1C1E; color: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 13px; box-shadow: 0 10px 25px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); min-width: 300px; } .ds-toast-message { flex: 1; } .ds-toast-action { color: #007AFF; font-weight: 500; background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; }

narrative.overview: Things 4 is a precision tool for task management. Like a well-calibrated instrument, it provides exactly the feedback you need and nothing more. The interface recedes into the background, leaving only your tasks and the actions you can take on them. It rejects the busy, cluttered aesthetic of Todoist and the bare-bones minimalism of Google Tasks. It rejects the cream-and-gradient warmth of generic SaaS tools. Instead, it finds its identity in the clinical precision of Apple's design language: system fonts, iOS-standard colors, generous whitespace, and interactions that feel native to the platform.
keyCharacteristics: System-native typography (SF Pro) with clear hierarchy through weight and size
Flat surfaces with tonal layering for depth (no shadows except on floating elements)
Generous whitespace that lets content breathe
Smooth, fluid transitions with subtle haptic-like feedback
iOS-standard color palette: blue accent, semantic red/green/yellow

rules.name: The 10% Accent Rule
rules.body: The blue accent appears on less than 10% of any given screen. Its rarity creates visual hierarchy and prevents the interface from feeling 'blue-heavy.'

rules.name: The One-Weight Rule
rules.body: All text uses the same font family. Bold is reserved for display headings and active navigation items. Regular weight carries 90% of the interface.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only on truly floating elements (dialogs, toasts) that脱离 the main layout.

dos: Do use the system font stack (-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont) for all text
Do use whitespace as the primary separator between content blocks
Do keep the blue accent (#007AFF) under 10% of screen area
Do use the semantic colors exactly as defined: red for deadlines, yellow for today, green for completion
Do provide smooth, 150ms transitions on all interactive state changes
Do use 26px for screen titles, 14px for body text, 11px for metadata
donts: Don't use cream, sand, beige, or warm-tinted backgrounds
Don't add gradient text, glassmorphism, or decorative blur effects
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent on list items
Don't use shadows on list items, cards, or content blocks
Don't pair two similar sans-serif font families
Don't animate layout properties (width, height, padding) unless truly necessary
Don't use border-radius greater than 12px on cards or dialogs
